short_summary: Iran deal near; NATO cuts; SpaceX IPO
rationale: Three concurrent fresh developments: US-Iran deal progress, US cutting NATO assets (policy shift), and SpaceX IPO market debut — all with real domestic relevance.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: A concrete US policy shift reducing military commitments to NATO Europe, reflecting the Trump administration's reorientation — directly affects US defense posture and allied relations.

top_events.title: US, Iran say deal closer than ever; Pakistan signals final terms are set
top_events.summary: A US-Iran nuclear/ceasefire deal appears imminent, which could reduce Middle East tensions, ease oil prices, and mark a major foreign policy outcome for the Trump administration.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO debuts in US markets, Musk becomes world's first trillionaire
top_events.summary: SpaceX's market debut is a landmark financial event affecting US investors, retirement funds, and tech market sentiment broadly; Musk's wealth milestone amplifies public attention.
